articles.title: CMA launches investigation into AI foundation models and competition
articles.excerpt: The CMA has launched a formal investigation into competitive dynamics in the AI foundation models sector, examining whether barriers to entry and expansion may be harming competition and consumers.

articles.title: European Commission opens proceedings against major gatekeeper under DMA
articles.excerpt: The European Commission has opened formal non-compliance proceedings under the Digital Markets Act against a designated gatekeeper, citing alleged violations of interoperability obligations.

articles.title: EDPB adopts guidelines on personal data processing in AI systems
articles.excerpt: The EDPB has published binding guidelines clarifying how data controllers must handle personal data when developing and deploying large language models and other AI systems under GDPR.

articles.title: FTC takes action against data broker for unlawful sale of sensitive location data
articles.excerpt: The Federal Trade Commission has filed a complaint against a data broker for the unlawful collection and sale of precise geolocation data, including data revealing visits to sensitive locations.

articles.title: ANPD publishes draft regulation on international data transfers
articles.source: Autoridade Nacional de Proteção de Dados (ANPD)
articles.excerpt: Brazil's data protection authority has published a draft regulation setting out the conditions and safeguards for international transfers of personal data, opening a 30-day public consultation.

articles.title: CCI orders investigation into alleged anti-competitive practices in quick commerce
articles.excerpt: The Competition Commission of India has directed its investigation arm to probe alleged anti-competitive practices by major quick commerce platforms operating in India's fast-growing on-demand delivery sector.

articles.title: ICO issues reprimand to financial services firm for unlawful marketing
articles.excerpt: The ICO has issued a formal reprimand to a financial services company following an investigation that found the firm had sent over 2 million unsolicited marketing messages without valid consent.

articles.title: Competition Commission SA concludes market inquiry into grocery retail sector
articles.excerpt: The Competition Commission of South Africa has published its final report from the grocery retail market inquiry, making recommendations to address structural competition concerns including buyer power and private label practices.

articles.title: CADE approves merger in digital payments sector with remedies
articles.source: CADE - Administrative Council for Economic Defense
articles.excerpt: CADE's Tribunal has approved a major merger in the Brazilian digital payments sector, subject to behavioral and structural remedies aimed at preserving competition in merchant acquiring and digital wallet markets.

articles.title: EU AI Act delegated regulation on prohibited practices enters into force
articles.source: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the EU
articles.excerpt: A delegated regulation under the EU Artificial Intelligence Act has entered into force, specifying detailed requirements and assessment criteria for AI systems classified under prohibited practices including social scoring and real-time biometric identification.

articles.title: Ofcom consults on online safety codes of practice for Category 1 services
articles.excerpt: Ofcom has launched a public consultation on proposed codes of practice for Category 1 services under the Online Safety Act, covering illegal content duties, transparency reporting, and user empowerment tools.

articles.title: Commission proposes revised payment services regulation targeting open banking
articles.excerpt: The European Commission has tabled a legislative proposal to revise the Payment Services Regulation, introducing new obligations for banks to provide third-party payment service providers with real-time access to payment account data under PSD3.
